changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_captured for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions accurately map to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities, which are essential for compliance with NIST 800-171 control 3.3.1. The naming is mostly clear and follows conventions, but a minor adjustment was made for consistency.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of past participle in function descriptions for clarity
title: 3_3_1: 3.3.1 Create and retain system audit logs and records to the extent needed to enable the monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized system activity
step1_reasoning: The control 3.3.1 from NIST 800-171 focuses on creating and retaining audit logs to monitor and investigate unauthorized activities. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to enabling audit logging, configuring log retention policies, and ensuring audit policies capture necessary metadata. These functions ensure that Kubernetes clusters have the necessary audit logging capabilities to monitor and analyze system activities.
